description: Flat decomposition example: M/M/1 Queue system decomposed in one pass

specification.function: M/M/1 queueing system. Generates arrivals with exponential inter-arrival times, processes them through a single server with exponential service times, and collects departure events. Time unit: 1.0 = 1 second.
specification.logging: Log arrival, service start, service completion, and departure events.

protocol.description: Sends completed customer data to external observer

model_init_args.name: arrival_rate
model_init_args.description: Lambda: average arrivals per time unit

model_init_args.name: service_rate
model_init_args.description: Mu: average services per time unit

specification.function: Generates customer arrivals. Inter-arrival times follow exponential distribution with rate lambda. Sends customer to Server upon generation. Stops after max_customers.

protocol.initial_signal: Sends first customer at T=0 after hold_in('INIT', 0)

specification.function: Single server with FIFO queue. Service times follow exponential distribution with rate mu. Processes one customer at a time. Queues additional customers.
specification.logging: Log service start and completion for each customer.

root_model.coupling_specification: EIC: none (no external inputs). IC: Generator.customer_out -> Server.customer_in. EOC: Server.departure_out -> Parent.departure_out. No cold-start deadlock: Generator self-activates at T=0.
